utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each item also includes the necessary details: health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health plans with a cost, property_coverage includes a plan and cost, travel_coverage includes a plan and cost, additional_services lists an addon and cost, and total_budget includes both monthly and annual cost breakdowns. All items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The final coverage plan lists several LifeFirst Standard Plan variants labeled Plan0–Plan3. In the ground-truth data, there is only one LifeFirst Standard Plan per domain, so these numbered variants all correspond to the same LifeFirst Standard Plan entry in each category. Mapping each component:
1. Physical health → 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 9.
2. Mental health → 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health has rating 9.
3. Property coverage → 'LifeFirst Standard Plan2' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, which has rating 9.
4. Travel coverage → 'LifeFirst Standard Plan1' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, rating 9.
5. Additional services → 'LifeFirst Standard Plan0' is labeled as the adventure travel add-on, corresponding to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services, rating 10.
